description: Legal document. Containing testimonies about a certain document (kitāb) that is deposited with the Nasi Abū l-Ḥasan, which is a debt contract for 200 dinars. Someone testifies that the document's contents are not what they seem from the outside (laysa bāṭinuhu ka-ẓāhiruhu). It seems that there is also testimony that that document is not a maʿase bet din. Signed: Natan b. Yeshuʿa; Yefet b. [...]. On verso there is Talmud, unrelated to recto. (Information in part from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי המכיל עדויות על מסמך מסוים המפקד אצל הנשיא אבו אל-חסן, שהוא חוזה חוב ל-200 דינרים. מישהו מעיד שתוכן המסמך אינו מה שנראה מבחוץ. חתמו: נתן ב. ישועה ויפת ב. [...]
